headline: 3 Reasons Investors Love Copart (CPRT)
summary: What a brutal six months it’s been for Copart. The stock has dropped 20.6% and now trades at $38.22, rattling many shareholders. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
